description: You are a security engineer at AcmeCorp responding to a security incident involving three production containers: acme-webapp, acme-gateway, and acme-monitor. A security scan has flagged all three with policy violations. Investigate each container to identify the security issues and create fixed replacements named acme-webapp-fixed, acme-gateway-fixed, and acme-monitor-fixed that resolve the vulnerabilities while preserving core functionality. Stop the original vulnerable containers and document your findings, the potential impact of the exploits, and your remediation steps in a security incident report at ~/Desktop/incident_report.txt. Do not destroy evidence before documentation is complete. Login: user ga, password password123.

security_issues.acme-monitor: dangerous bind mount of /etc from host
